action.reasoning: Observation: baseline eval is valid with spearman 0.5969, but training took ~2.4h due a large 176-position pairwise ridge grid. Analysis: mutation signal is known to be concentrated in 28 AA positions (560:588); restricting features to this window should train much faster and may improve hidden extrapolation by reducing noisy full-sequence variable positions. Decision: add a fast window-only ridge training script using existing model/predict infrastructure, train a tuned checkpoint, smoke-test predict.py, and submit eval.
action.command: python train_window.py --out checkpoints/window.pkl && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/window.pkl --output predictions_window_smoke.json

eval_result.eval_log:
